title: selaginella imbricata
intro: Selaginella imbricata is a species of flowering plant in the family Selaginellaceae, also known as the spikemoss family, and is native to tropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Selaginella imbricata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams for external use.
